passwordPolicy: length(12) and upperCase(1) and lowerCase(1) and digits(1) and specialChars(1) and passwordHistory(5) and forceExpiredPasswordChange(90)

realm.name: SUPER_ADMIN
realm.description: Super administrator with full system access across all branches and regions

realm.name: REGIONAL_ADMIN
realm.description: Regional administrator managing multiple branches within a region

realm.name: SYSTEM_ADMIN
realm.description: System administrator managing configuration and infrastructure

realm.name: AUDITOR
realm.description: Read-only auditor with access to compliance reports and audit trails

bloodbank-api.name: BRANCH_ADMIN
bloodbank-api.description: Branch administrator managing day-to-day branch operations

bloodbank-api.name: BRANCH_MANAGER
bloodbank-api.description: Branch manager overseeing clinical and operational staff

bloodbank-api.name: DOCTOR
bloodbank-api.description: Medical doctor performing clinical assessments and approvals

bloodbank-api.name: LAB_TECHNICIAN
bloodbank-api.description: Laboratory technician performing blood tests and quality control

bloodbank-api.name: NURSE
bloodbank-api.description: Nurse assisting with clinical procedures and donor care

bloodbank-api.name: INVENTORY_MANAGER
bloodbank-api.description: Inventory manager controlling blood unit stock and storage

bloodbank-api.name: BILLING_CLERK
bloodbank-api.description: Billing clerk managing invoices and payments

bloodbank-api.name: CAMP_COORDINATOR
bloodbank-api.description: Camp coordinator organising blood donation camps

bloodbank-api.name: RECEPTIONIST
bloodbank-api.description: Receptionist handling donor registration and appointments

bloodbank-api.name: HOSPITAL_USER
bloodbank-api.description: Hospital portal user requesting blood units

bloodbank-api.name: DONOR
bloodbank-api.description: Registered blood donor accessing the donor self-service portal

clients.name: BloodBank API
clients.description: Confidential backend API client with service account

clients.name: BloodBank UI
clients.description: Public Angular SPA client with PKCE, for donor, staff and hospital portals

authenticationFlows.description: BloodBank browser-based authentication with role-based MFA
Username/password with conditional role-based OTP
MFA required for admin and privileged roles (SUPER_ADMIN, REGIONAL_ADMIN, SYSTEM_ADMIN, AUDITOR, BRANCH_ADMIN)
MFA optional for clinical roles (DOCTOR, LAB_TECHNICIAN, NURSE) — prompted only if already configured

Username, password, otp and other auth forms.
